plugin.name: Solao_Player_Tracker
plugin.author: Solao
plugin.purpose: Tracks every player seen in 'who' -- clan, ranks, title, online/offline, searchable

muclient.script:
require "movewindow" local serialize = require "serialize"
local TITLE = "Player Tracker" local PVER = GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 19) or "?" local ZPLUG = "462b665ecb569efbf261422f" -- z-order monitor plugin local win = GetPluginID() local FONT = "ptf"
------------------------------------------------------------------ -- config (persisted) + runtime ------------------------------------------------------------------ local function defaults () return { width = 300, height = 360, size = 9, font = "Dina", ontop = true, players = {}, -- name:lower -> rec avg = { sum = 0, n = 0 }, -- rolling online average } end local cfg = defaults() local windowinfo
local view = {} -- filtered + sorted list currently drawn local filter = "" local scroll = 0 local capturing = false local who_seen = {} local fh = 14 -- font pixel height local drag_x0, drag_y0, drag_w0, drag_h0
------------------------------------------------------------------ -- clan decoration -> short tag (punctuation-anchored, title-safe) ------------------------------------------------------------------ local DECOR = { {"|| BOOT ||","boot"}, {"}HooK{","hook"}, {")light(","light"}, {"(Seekers)","seekers"}, {"[Emerald]","emerald"}, {"[Ba'al]","baal"}, {"-=Masaki=-","masaki"}, {"winlobe","twinlobe"}, {"|Watchmen|","watchmen"}, {"TouchStone","touchstone"}, {"imson|","crimson"}, {"erdition","perdition"}, {"aardian|","gaardian"}, {"Loqui|","loqui"}, {"/Pyre","pyre"}, {"IMPERIUM","imperium"}, {"ibution-","retribution"}, {"[Loner]","loner"}, {"|Wolf|","wolf"}, {"}Tao{","tao"}, {"/|\\","druid"}, {"Rhabdo/","rhabdo"}, } local CLAN = { wolf="The Wolf Administration", loner="The Lone Adventurers", outcast="The Outcast Clan of Shame", twinlobe="The Fellowship of the Twin Lobes", watchmen="The Watchmen of Aardwolf", seekers="The Seekers", emerald="The Emerald Knights", light="The Order of Light", baal="The Children of Ba'alzamon", hook="The Hook Clan", bard="Order of the Bard", crusader="Crusaders of the Nameless One", xunti="The Xunti Cult", imperium="Clan Imperium", crimson="The Crimson Horde", retribution="Retribution", druid="The Great Circle of Druids", amazon="The Tribes of the Amazon", pyre="The Soul Pyre", masaki="Masaki Clan", rhabdo="Dark Templars of Rhabdo Rana", perdition="Knights of Perdition", loqui="Loqui", gaardian="The Midgaardian Publishing Group", tao="The Creation of Tao", touchstone="House of Touchstone", boot="Boot Lyceum", } local function clan_full (t) return CLAN[t or ""] or "" end
local function detect_clan (line) for _, d in ipairs(DECOR) do if line:find(d[1], 1, true) then return d[2] end end return "" end
------------------------------------------------------------------ -- parse one who row ------------------------------------------------------------------ local function trim (s) return (s or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") end
local FLAGS = { "%*AFK%*", "%(OPK%)", "%(HARDCORE%)", "%(Linkdead%)" }
local function parse (line) local info, body = line:match("^%[(.-)%]%s*(.*)$") if not info then return nil end info, body = trim(info), trim(body)
-- peel any leading [Rank]/[Position] brackets and who flags, in any order, -- until the name is at the front (clan tags like [Ba'al] sit at the tail, safe) local ranks = "" local changed = true while changed do changed = false local rtag, rest = body:match("^%[([^%]]+)%]%s*(.*)$") if rtag then ranks = ranks == "" and trim(rtag) or (ranks .. " " .. trim(rtag)) body, changed = trim(rest), true end for _, f in ipairs(FLAGS) do local nb = body:gsub("^" .. f .. "%s*", "", 1) if nb ~= body then body, changed = nb, true end end end
local clan = detect_clan(line) local title = body local cut for _, d in ipairs(DECOR) do local p = body:find(d[1], 1, true) if p then cut = math.min(cut or 1e9, p) end end if cut then title = trim(body:sub(1, cut - 1)) end
local name = title:match("^(%S+)") if not name then return nil end return { name = name, title = title, ranks = ranks, clan = clan, info = info } end
------------------------------------------------------------------ -- online model ------------------------------------------------------------------ -- not seen by a 'who' in this long = offline. Matches the Who Poller's 10 minute -- cadence: every poll refreshes everyone still on, so anyone who ages out is gone. local ONLINE_TTL = 600
local function is_online (r) if r.on == false then return false end return r.on == true and (os.time() - (r.seen or 0) < ONLINE_TTL) end local function ago (t) if not t then return "?" end local d = os.time() - t if d < 60 then return d.."s" end if d < 3600 then return math.floor(d/60).."m" end if d < 86400 then return math.floor(d/3600).."h" end return math.floor(d/86400).."d" end
------------------------------------------------------------------ -- capture ------------------------------------------------------------------ function on_who (line) local p = parse(line) if not p then return end if not capturing then capturing, who_seen = true, {} end local key = p.name:lower() who_seen[key] = true
local r = cfg.players[key] or {} r.name = p.name r.title = p.title if p.ranks ~= "" then r.ranks = p.ranks end if p.clan ~= "" then r.clan = p.clan end r.info = p.info r.seen = os.time() r.on = true cfg.players[key] = r end
function who_done (n) capturing = false if n and n > 0 then cfg.avg.sum = cfg.avg.sum + n; cfg.avg.n = cfg.avg.n + 1 end rebuild() SaveState() end
function clan_login (name) local key = name:lower() local r = cfg.players[key] or { name = name } r.name = r.name or name r.on, r.seen = true, os.time() cfg.players[key] = r rebuild() end
function clan_logout (name) local r = cfg.players[name:lower()] if r then r.on = false; rebuild() end end
------------------------------------------------------------------ -- stats + view ------------------------------------------------------------------ local function count_seen () local n=0; for _ in pairs(cfg.players) do n=n+1 end; return n end local function count_online () local n=0; for _,r in pairs(cfg.players) do if is_online(r) then n=n+1 end end; return n end local function avg_online () if cfg.avg.n == 0 then return 0 end; return math.floor(cfg.avg.sum/cfg.avg.n + 0.5) end
local function build_view () view = {} local f = filter:lower() for _, r in pairs(cfg.players) do local hay = (r.name.." "..(r.title or "").." "..clan_full(r.clan)):lower() if f == "" or hay:find(f, 1, true) then view[#view+1] = r end end table.sort(view, function (a, b) local ao, bo = is_online(a), is_online(b) if ao ~= bo then return ao end return (a.seen or 0) > (b.seen or 0) end) end
------------------------------------------------------------------ -- geometry ------------------------------------------------------------------ local PAD = 6 local function title_h () return fh + 4 end local function stats_top () return title_h() + PAD end local function search_top () return stats_top() + fh*2 + 2 end local function list_top () return search_top() + fh + PAD + 6 end local function row_h () return fh + 2 end local function vis_rows () return math.max(0, math.floor((cfg.height - list_top() - PAD) / row_h())) end
------------------------------------------------------------------ -- colors (0xBBGGRR) + paint ------------------------------------------------------------------ local COL = { bg=0x1A1A1A, bar=0x2E2E2E, accent=0x66CCFF, dim=0x999999, text=0xE0E0E0, online=0x33CC33, offline=0x666666, box=0x3A3A3A, } local function txt (x, y, s, col, right) local w = WindowTextWidth(win, FONT, s) if right then x = x - w end WindowText(win, FONT, s, x, y, 0, 0, col) return w end
function paint () WindowRectOp(win, 2, 0, 0, 0, 0, COL.bg)
WindowRectOp(win, 2, 0, 0, 0, title_h(), COL.bar) local tw = txt(PAD, 2, TITLE, COL.accent) txt(PAD + tw + 5, 3, "v"..PVER, COL.dim)
local y = stats_top() txt(PAD, y, "Seen: "..count_seen(), COL.text) txt(cfg.width - PAD, y, "Online: "..count_online(), COL.online, true) txt(PAD, y + fh, "Avg online: "..avg_online(), COL.dim)
local sy = search_top() WindowRectOp(win, 2, PAD, sy, cfg.width - PAD, sy + fh + 2, COL.box) WindowRectOp(win, 1, PAD, sy, cfg.width - PAD, sy + fh + 2, COL.bar) if filter ~= "" then txt(PAD + 4, sy + 1, "Search: "..filter, COL.text) txt(cfg.width - PAD - 5, sy + 1, "x", COL.dim, true) else txt(PAD + 4, sy + 1, "Search... (click)", COL.dim) end
local ly, rows = list_top(), vis_rows() if #view == 0 then txt(PAD, ly, filter ~= "" and "No matches." or "No players yet -- type 'who'.", COL.dim) else local first = scroll + 1 for i = 0, rows - 1 do local r = view[first + i] if not r then break end local ry = ly + i * row_h() local on = is_online(r) WindowCircleOp(win, 2, PAD+1, ry+3, PAD+8, ry+10, on and COL.online or COL.offline, 0, 1, on and COL.online or COL.offline, 1) local nx = PAD + 13 local nw = txt(nx, ry, r.name, on and COL.text or COL.dim) if r.clan and r.clan ~= "" then txt(nx + nw + 6, ry, "("..r.clan..")", COL.accent) end txt(cfg.width - PAD, ry, ago(r.seen), COL.dim, true) end if #view > rows then local more = #view - (scroll + rows) if more > 0 then txt(cfg.width - PAD, cfg.height - fh, "+"..more.." more", COL.dim, true) end end end
-- resize grip WindowLine(win, cfg.width-9, cfg.height-3, cfg.width-3, cfg.height-9, COL.dim, 0, 1) WindowLine(win, cfg.width-6, cfg.height-3, cfg.width-3, cfg.height-6, COL.dim, 0, 1) end
------------------------------------------------------------------ -- layout / hotspots ------------------------------------------------------------------ function rebuild () build_view() local maxs = math.max(0, #view - vis_rows()) if scroll > maxs then scroll = maxs end
WindowResize(win, cfg.width, cfg.height, COL.bg) WindowDeleteAllHotspots(win)
-- search bar local sy = search_top() WindowAddHotspot(win, "search", PAD, sy, cfg.width - PAD, sy + fh + 2, "", "", "hs_search", "", "", "click to search", miniwin.cursor_hand, 0)
-- rows local ly, rows = list_top(), vis_rows() local first = scroll + 1 for i = 0, rows - 1 do local r = view[first + i] if not r then break end local ry = ly + i * row_h() local id = "row_" .. (first + i) WindowAddHotspot(win, id, PAD, ry, cfg.width - PAD, ry + row_h(), "", "", "hs_row", "", "", "click for info", miniwin.cursor_hand, 0) WindowScrollwheelHandler(win, id, "hs_wheel") end
-- body (wheel over empty space) WindowAddHotspot(win, "body", 0, ly, cfg.width, cfg.height, "", "", "", "", "", "", 0, 0) WindowScrollwheelHandler(win, "body", "hs_wheel")
-- resize grip local g = math.max(12, fh) WindowAddHotspot(win, "grip", cfg.width-g, cfg.height-g, cfg.width, cfg.height, "", "", "hs_grip_down", "", "", "drag to resize", miniwin.cursor_hand, 0) WindowDragHandler(win, "grip", "hs_grip_move", "hs_grip_done", 0)
-- title drag (re-add after DeleteAll) movewindow.add_drag_handler(win, 0, 0, cfg.width, title_h())
paint() end
------------------------------------------------------------------ -- hotspot handlers ------------------------------------------------------------------ function hs_row (flags, id) local n = tonumber(id:match("row_(%d+)")) local r = n and view[n] if r then show_info(r.name) end end
function hs_search (flags, id) if filter ~= "" and WindowInfo(win, 14) >= cfg.width - PAD - 14 then filter = ""; scroll = 0; rebuild(); return end local q = utils.inputbox("Search players by name, clan or title.\nLeave blank to show everyone.", TITLE, filter) if q ~= nil then filter = trim(q); scroll = 0; rebuild() end end
function hs_wheel (flags, id) local dir = (bit.band(flags, 0x100) ~= 0) and 1 or -1 local maxs = math.max(0, #view - vis_rows()) scroll = math.max(0, math.min(maxs, scroll + dir)) rebuild() end
function hs_grip_down (flags, id) drag_x0, drag_y0 = WindowInfo(win, 17), WindowInfo(win, 18) drag_w0, drag_h0 = cfg.width, cfg.height end function hs_grip_move (flags, id) local nw = math.max(220, drag_w0 + (WindowInfo(win,17) - drag_x0)) local nh = math.max(160, drag_h0 + (WindowInfo(win,18) - drag_y0)) if nw ~= cfg.width or nh ~= cfg.height then cfg.width, cfg.height = nw, nh WindowResize(win, cfg.width, cfg.height, COL.bg) -- resize + repaint, NOT rebuild paint() end SetCursor(miniwin.cursor_hand) end function hs_grip_done (flags, id) rebuild() -- safe now: re-place hotspots at the new size SaveState() end
function pt_titlebar (flags, id) if bit.band(flags, miniwin.hotspot_got_rh_mouse) == 0 then return end local menu = "Bring to Front|Send to Back|Always on Top ("..(cfg.ontop and "on" or "off")..")|-|Search...|Clear filter|-|Hide" local r = WindowMenu(win, WindowInfo(win,14), WindowInfo(win,15), menu) if r == "Bring to Front" then CallPlugin(ZPLUG, "boostMe", win) elseif r == "Send to Back" then CallPlugin(ZPLUG, "dropMe", win) elseif r:find("Always on Top") then cfg.ontop = not cfg.ontop if cfg.ontop then CallPlugin(ZPLUG, "boostMe", win) end SaveState() elseif r == "Search..." then hs_search(flags, id) elseif r == "Clear filter" then filter = ""; scroll = 0; rebuild() elseif r == "Hide" then WindowShow(win, false) end end
------------------------------------------------------------------ -- info + commands ------------------------------------------------------------------ function show_info (name) local r = cfg.players[name:lower()] if not r then ColourNote("silver","","No record for "..name); return end ColourNote("cyan","","--- "..r.name.." ---") ColourNote("white",""," Title : "..(r.title or "?")) if r.ranks and r.ranks ~= "" then ColourNote("white",""," Ranks : "..r.ranks) end ColourNote("white",""," Clan : "..(r.clan ~= "" and (clan_full(r.clan).." ("..r.clan..")") or "none")) ColourNote("white",""," Level : "..(r.info or "?")) ColourNote(is_online(r) and "green" or "silver",""," Status: "..(is_online(r) and "online" or "offline").." (seen "..ago(r.seen).." ago)") end
local function do_find (term) term = trim(term):lower() if term == "" then ColourNote("silver","","Usage: pt find <text>"); return end local hits = {} for _, r in pairs(cfg.players) do local hay = (r.name.." "..(r.title or "").." "..clan_full(r.clan)):lower() if hay:find(term, 1, true) then hits[#hits+1] = r end end table.sort(hits, function(a,b) return (a.seen or 0) > (b.seen or 0) end) ColourNote("cyan","", #hits.." match"..(#hits==1 and "" or "es").." for '"..term.."':") for _, r in ipairs(hits) do ColourNote(is_online(r) and "green" or "silver","", string.format(" %-14s %-24s %s ago", r.name, clan_full(r.clan), ago(r.seen))) end end
local function do_export () local path = GetInfo(66) .. "players.csv" local f = io.open(path, "w") if not f then ColourNote("red","","Can't write "..path); return end f:write("name,clan,ranks,level,online,last_seen_epoch,title\n") for _, r in pairs(cfg.players) do f:write(string.format('%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%d,"%s"\n', r.name, r.clan or "", (r.ranks or ""):gsub(",",";"), (r.info or ""):gsub(",",";"), tostring(is_online(r)), r.seen or 0, (r.title or ""):gsub('"',"'"))) end f:close() ColourNote("green","","Exported "..count_seen().." players -> "..path) end
function pt_cmd (arg) arg = trim(arg or "") local cmd, rest = arg:match("^(%S+)%s*(.*)$") cmd = (cmd or ""):lower() if cmd == "" then if WindowInfo(win, 5) then WindowShow(win, false) else WindowShow(win, true); rebuild() end elseif cmd == "find" then do_find(rest) elseif cmd == "info" then show_info(trim(rest)) elseif cmd == "online" then build_view() ColourNote("cyan","","Online now ("..count_online().."):") for _, r in ipairs(view) do if is_online(r) then ColourNote("green",""," "..r.name.." ("..clan_full(r.clan)..")") end end elseif cmd == "count" then ColourNote("cyan","", count_seen().." tracked, "..count_online().." online, avg "..avg_online().." a time.") elseif cmd == "export" then do_export() elseif cmd == "clear" then if rest == "yes" then cfg.players = {}; scroll = 0; rebuild(); SaveState(); ColourNote("green","","Database cleared.") else ColourNote("silver","","Wipes ALL tracked players. Type: pt clear yes") end else pt_help() end end
function pt_help () ColourNote("cyan","", TITLE.." v"..PVER) for _, l in ipairs({ " pt - show/hide the window", " pt find <text> - search name / clan / title", " pt info <name> - full record for one player", " pt online - list who's online now", " pt count - quick totals", " pt export - dump players.csv", " pt clear yes - wipe the database", " pt help - this", "Window: click a name for info, click the search bar to filter,", "wheel to scroll, drag the grip to resize, right-click title for", "Front / Back / Always-on-Top. Online is live for your own clan;", "others show as online for a while after the last 'who'.", }) do ColourNote("white","", l) end end
------------------------------------------------------------------ -- lifecycle ------------------------------------------------------------------ function OnPluginInstall () cfg = defaults() local blob = GetVariable("cfg") if blob then local ok = pcall(function() assert(loadstring(blob))() end) if ok and saved then for k, v in pairs(saved) do cfg[k] = v end cfg.players = cfg.players or {} cfg.avg = cfg.avg or { sum = 0, n = 0 } end end
windowinfo = movewindow.install(win, miniwin.pos_top_left, miniwin.create_absolute_location, false, nil, { mouseup = pt_titlebar }, { x = 10, y = 120 }) WindowCreate(win, windowinfo.window_left, windowinfo.window_top, cfg.width, cfg.height, windowinfo.window_mode, windowinfo.window_flags, COL.bg)
WindowFont(win, FONT, cfg.font, cfg.size) fh = WindowFontInfo(win, FONT, 1) if not fh or fh == 0 then WindowFont(win, FONT, "Courier New", cfg.size) fh = WindowFontInfo(win, FONT, 1) or 14 end
rebuild() WindowShow(win, true) if cfg.ontop then CallPlugin(ZPLUG, "boostMe", win) end end
function SaveState () SetVariable("cfg", "saved = "..serialize.save_simple(cfg)) if WindowInfo(win, 1) then movewindow.save_state(win) end end function OnPluginSaveState () SaveState() end
function OnPluginClose () WindowShow(win, false) WindowDelete(win) end function OnPluginEnable () WindowShow(win, true); rebuild() end function OnPluginDisable () WindowShow(win, false) end
